---
name: start-engagement
description: >
  Kick off a new client engagement — audit the codebase and produce a
  project estimate with milestones and a client-facing timeline.
---

@engagement-orchestrator

I have just been given a new client project. Here is what they want done:

[PASTE YOUR CLIENT BRIEF HERE]

Please:
1. Audit this codebase and tell me what we're working with
2. Break the work into milestones with complexity levels and time estimates
3. Produce a client-ready project timeline I can share directly

Let me know if you need any clarification before you start.
